objective: Adapt the existing ClawX demo into the approved KaiTianClaw workbench UI and preserve project progress across sessions.

tasks.title: Establish continue/ persistence mechanism
tasks.description: Create AGENT.MD, task.json, and progress.txt in continue/ and use them as the durable source of session state.
acceptance_criteria: continue/AGENT.MD exists
continue/task.json exists and is valid JSON
continue/progress.txt includes this planning session
tasks.notes: All three persistence files exist and were used during the recovery after the interrupted session.

tasks.title: Define main workbench shell
tasks.description: Approve the top-level workbench shell structure and UX principles.
acceptance_criteria: Approved shell includes left sidebar, center work area, and right context rail
Responsive collapse priority is documented

tasks.title: Define left sidebar work-object grouping
tasks.description: Approve clones/teams/channels/scheduled-tasks accordion grouping and collapse behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Four required sidebar groups are defined
Team appears as an operational work object

tasks.title: Define right context rail
tasks.description: Approve lightweight context cards and right-rail collapse behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Right rail is contextual and secondary
Collapsed handle behavior is defined

tasks.title: Define settings-center grouping
tasks.description: Approve grouped settings information architecture separated from daily workbench operations.
acceptance_criteria: Settings groups are defined
Operational vs deep-configuration split is explicit

tasks.title: Break approved design into executable implementation tasks
tasks.description: Produce the detailed implementation sequence and file map for phased execution.
acceptance_criteria: Implementation plan exists under docs/superpowers/plans
PERSIST task is first in execution order

tasks.title: Integrate new workbench shell into current app
tasks.description: Refactor existing layout and chat page into approved workbench shell incrementally.
acceptance_criteria: Main workbench shell appears in existing app structure
Legacy routing remains safe during transition
tasks.notes: Main workbench shell was integrated into the existing Chat route instead of creating a new app shell.

tasks.title: Implement collapsible left and right rails
tasks.description: Add accordion-driven left work-object rail and collapsible right context rail.
acceptance_criteria: Left sidebar supports expanded and icon-rail collapse
Right context rail supports collapsed handle mode
tasks.notes: Left sidebar accordion groups and right context rail collapse behaviors are implemented and covered by tests.

tasks.title: Implement settings-center grouped UI
tasks.description: Convert settings page to grouped secondary navigation and section-card layout.
acceptance_criteria: Grouped settings navigation exists
Existing working settings modules are preserved and reorganized
tasks.notes: Settings page was reorganized into grouped secondary navigation while preserving working provider/proxy/developer sections.

tasks.title: Land static PRD-aligned workbench and settings content
tasks.description: Populate workbench/settings surfaces with approved static PRD-first modules and labels.
acceptance_criteria: Core sidebar/context/settings placeholders are present
i18n labels cover new UI surfaces
tasks.notes: Static workbench placeholders, team structure, context rail cards, settings-center placeholders, browser-safe preview fallback, and shell-sketch-aligned visual styling are present.

tasks.title: Run UI verification and documentation sync
tasks.description: Execute required tests/checks and update README docs if behavior changed.
acceptance_criteria: Targeted unit tests pass
Typecheck/lint/build pass
README sync rule is satisfied
tasks.notes: Targeted unit tests, browser-preview test, typecheck, lint, and build:vite all ran after the shell-style polish. Lint only reports a pre-existing warning in electron/api/routes/providers.ts. Static browser preview now avoids crashing when window.electron is unavailable.

tasks.title: Deliver Figma full-page design review for KaiTianClaw
tasks.description: Create a Chinese-first full-page KaiTianClaw review deck that fuses ClawPort and OpenClaw Control Center capabilities into the current ClawX information architecture, with ChatGPT-web-inspired visual language.
acceptance_criteria: Review deck covers workbench empty state, active conversation, team/channel/scheduled-task view, and grouped settings-center views
Layout rhythm, color system, material hierarchy, and navigation-to-workbench relationship are documented
Primary review artifact is delivered through Figma MCP when available, with a local HTML board as fallback
tasks.notes: Delivered the review deck through Figma MCP to file 7gBaKvTT8oFRYkPqN02p2F and kept the local source board at docs/figma-review/kaitianclaw-design-board.html. The approved visual direction is ChatGPT-workbench fusion: keep the current workbench-first IA, borrow ClawPort's left-rail operational rhythm and OpenClaw Control Center's lightweight governance cards, then restyle the full deck with ChatGPT-web-inspired neutral surfaces and green accents.

tasks.title: Apply approved KaiTianClaw review deck to current source
tasks.description: Translate the approved Figma review deck into the existing ClawX workbench and settings-center implementation without introducing a disconnected new frontend.
acceptance_criteria: Current workbench shell visually aligns with the approved review deck
Settings center reflects the approved grouped page structure and card hierarchy
Implementation stays on the current source mainline and preserves the renderer/main API boundary
tasks.notes: Start from the approved Figma deck and local HTML review board instead of inventing a new layout direction during implementation.
